meaning: adj.[天](存在于或来自于)太阳系以外的
examples: Most known extrasolar planets reside in highly elongated, not circular, orbits.
It will also help with the search for extrasolar planets.
Time to start giving extrasolar planets proper names
Perhaps, therefore, it is time to change the convention and give such a name to an extrasolar planet.
And its resolving power will help with the search for extrasolar planets.
